name: Happiness and D Co., Ltd.
summary: Happiness and D Co., Ltd. develops and manages gift shops in shopping malls in Japan. It operates 85 stores, including 4 stores in Hokkaido; 10 stores in Tohoku; 27 stores in Kanto; 15 stores in Chubu; 9 stores in Kinki; 4 stores in Chugoku; 4 stores in Shikoku; 10 stores in Kyushu; and 2 stores in Okinawa. The company was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
